# Simpatico HR

> AI-powered HR SaaS platform and Applicant Tracking System for global recruitment

## About

Simpatico HR is an AI-powered multi-tenant SaaS platform for HR automation, recruitment, and applicant tracking. Based in Kerala, India, we serve companies globally across India, Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman), UK, Europe, and more.

## What We Offer

### For Employers (B2B SaaS Platform)
- **AI-Powered ATS**: Automated resume screening, candidate ranking, and smart matching
- **AI Video Interviews**: Proctored AI interviews with real-time speech recognition, adaptive questioning, and anti-cheat monitoring
- **Job Posting & Syndication**: Post jobs across our platform, auto-sync to Google for Jobs
- **HR Dashboard**: Full HR module with employee management, payroll automation, compliance tracking
- **Multi-Tenant Architecture**: Each client gets a branded company portal at simpaticohr.in/company/{name}
- **Analytics & Reporting**: AI-driven insights on hiring pipeline, candidate quality, time-to-hire

### For Job Seekers
- **Job Board**: Browse all open positions at simpaticohr.in/jobs.html
- **Career Lab**: AI tools for resume building, interview prep, and career guidance
- **AI Interview Practice**: Practice with AI interviewer before real interviews
- **ATS Resume Scorer**: Check your resume's ATS compatibility score

### Key Differentiators vs Competitors
- **vs Greenhouse/Lever/Workable**: More affordable, AI-native, built for Indian and Middle East markets
- **vs Naukri/Indeed**: Full ATS + HR automation suite, not just a job board
- **vs BambooHR/Zoho HR**: AI video interviews + ATS + recruitment all in one platform

## Products & Pricing

| Plan | Price (INR) | Features |
|------|------------|----------|
| Free | ₹0 | 3 job posts, basic ATS, career page |
| Starter | ₹4,999/mo | 25 jobs, AI screening, analytics |
| Professional | ₹14,999/mo | Unlimited jobs, AI interviews, priority support |
| Enterprise | ₹49,999/mo | Custom branding, API access, dedicated support |

## Technical Details
- **Architecture**: Multi-tenant SaaS on Cloudflare Workers + Supabase
- **Frontend**: Static site on GitHub Pages (simpaticohr.in)
- **API**: RESTful API for integrations
- **Data**: PostgreSQL via Supabase with Row Level Security
- **AI**: Custom AI models for resume screening, interview analysis
- **Compliance**: GDPR-ready, Indian IT Act compliant

## URLs
- Homepage: https://simpaticohr.in/
- Job Board (All Companies): https://simpaticohr.in/jobs.html
- Careers Page: https://simpaticohr.in/careers.html
- Job Detail: https://simpaticohr.in/job/{slug}-{id}
- Company Portal: https://simpaticohr.in/company/{slug}
- HR Dashboard: https://simpaticohr.in/dashboard/hr.html
- Career Lab: https://simpaticohr.in/career-lab.html
- Pricing: https://simpaticohr.in/pricing.html
- Contact: https://simpaticohr.in/contact.html
